title: Sword To Sticks
description: Changes all the sword & spear textures to sticks.
body:
A random texture pack that changes all the sword and spear textures to a stick for some reason. 

 

### **Made for version 1.21.11**

Tried making it work for the trident, but the model didn't change, only the item did :(

(also i took this screenshot before i added the copper sword and spears)

i love fighting with sticks
![Combat tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6770ddafb8c69e1778c567bdf00dcd887d5286ee_0.webp)
